title: podachaenium chiapanum
intro: Podachaenium chiapanum, also known as Chiapas mint, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Podachaenium chiapanum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
